name: Data Exporter
description: Exports table data to a CSV file with customizable delimiters and formatting

customDelimiter.description: Custom delimiter character (used when delimiter is set to 'custom')

dateFormat.description: Date format pattern for date values

fileName.description: Base file name for the exported CSV (without extension)

includeHeaders.description: Include column headers as the first row in the CSV

buttonLabel.description: Label text displayed on the export button

buttonColor.description: Background color of the export button (CSS color value)

useRawValues.description: Use raw numeric values instead of SAC-formatted values (allows custom number formatting)

exportCSV.description: Triggers CSV export programmatically from a script

onExportComplete.description: Called when the CSV export has completed successfully.

onExportError.description: Called when the CSV export encounters an error.

feeds.description: Dimensions (columns/rows) to include in the CSV
Measures (values) to include in the CSV
